(f) Unused drugs returned to the phar-
macy. The terms and conditions that 
must be offered by a Part D sponsor 
under § 423.120(a)(5) must include provi-
sions that address the disposal of drugs 
that have been dispensed to an enrollee 
in a long-term care facility but not 
used and which have been returned to 
the pharmacy, in accordance with Fed-
eral and State regulations, as well as 
whether return for credit and reuse is 
authorized
